series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains files related to site-specific technical assistance related to erosion control and proposed projects along the shore of Lake Erie. Technical assistance is provided in accordance with Ohio Revised Code Section 1506.47. Files may contain requests, correspondence, site assessments, and site photographs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Permanent unless replaced by a legible electronic version
